Description: GoodShip helps shippers reduce freight costs and improve service by centralizing procurement, carrier management, and transportation analytics in one platform. Description: Filics provides an innovative automated double runner system, the Filics Unit, for efficient pallet transportation in intralogistics, addressing labor shortages and increasing productivity. This compact, autonomously guided vehicle offers omnidirectional movement and fits seamlessly under various load carriers without the need for maneuvering. It utilizes laser navigation and is controlled by a web-based, customizable software platform for intuitive operation and performance analysis. The system is designed for collaborative operation with employees, automating tasks like loading, unloading, and production line transport. Filics targets logistics and manufacturing companies, supporting loads up to 800 kg, and has demonstrated significant efficiency gains with clients like DHL Supply Chain.

Description: ATMOS Space Cargo provides predictable, low-stress return of payloads from orbit to Earth for research, manufacturing, and defense customers. Description: Portal Space Systems builds the Supernova, a payload-agnostic satellite bus that provides rapid, long-range maneuverability for spacecraft operators. Portal sells the Supernova as an OEM spacecraft platform and provides vehicle integration and mission support to satellite developers and government and defense operators.

Description: Portless is a logistics and fulfillment platform that enables e-commerce, retail, and apparel brands to ship orders directly from China to customers worldwide, bypassing traditional ports to save time and reduce costs. Description: Inversion Space is building autonomous re-entry vehicles to deliver cargo from space to anywhere on Earth in under an hour. Founded in a Los Angeles garage in 2021 and incubated at Y Combinator, the company aims to make space a transportation layer for Earth. Their core products include 'Ray', an autonomous re-entry vehicle already on orbit, and 'Arc', a fully autonomous global delivery vehicle launching in 2026 with a mission duration of over 5 years and landing accuracy of less than 50 ft. Description: Electra is an aerospace company developing hybrid-electric Ultra Short Takeoff and Landing (STOL) aircraft to enhance regional air mobility. Its patented blown-lift technology allows for takeoffs and landings in as little as 150 feet, combining helicopter-like flexibility with fixed-wing safety and economics. The hybrid-electric propulsion system facilitates clean, quiet operations near populated areas and efficient longer routes. These aircraft can transport 9 passengers or 3,000 lbs of cargo and operate from very small spaces, expanding air service to underserved communities. Electra has over 2,100 aircraft pre-ordered by more than 50 operators globally, positioning it as a leader in regional air travel decarbonization.

Description: Oway turns unused truck capacity into an on-demand freight marketplace that connects carriers with businesses shipping small pallet loads to reduce cost and transit time. It uses machine learning, stochastic spread optimization, and real-time liquidity modeling to dynamically price shipments and match capacity across partially empty trucks. The platform exposes a web UI and developer APIs for shippers, brokers, and carriers to automate quotes, scheduling, paperwork, and payments. Oway functions as a decentralized market maker for short-haul palletized freight (up to ~12 pallets) and supports integration with carrier workflows to add capacity without disrupting routes. The service targets U.S. regional lanes with an emphasis on overnight and small-batch freight for SMBs and third-party logistics partners.

Description: Parallel Systems is a company focused on transforming freight transportation by converting freight from trucking to rail. They are developing automated, battery-electric, freight rail vehicles and the tools to integrate this service into railroad operations. Their technology aims to enable railroads to serve new markets on corridors less than 1,000 miles, offering a more flexible, zero-emissions option. Description: Fetii provides on-demand and pre-scheduled group ridesharing and corporate shuttle services that let groups and commuters travel together in 15-passenger vans.
